evaluator.codeSplitting: premium panels (Monte Carlo + Portfolio) dynamically imported

features.name: FIRE Calculation Engine
features.verified: Default input → Regular=$1M, Lean=$600K, Fat=$1.5M, timeline=51 entries

features.name: Timeline Chart
features.verified: Recharts AreaChart with 5 FIRE reference lines + achievement markers

features.name: FIRE Result Cards
features.verified: 5 cards with correct targets, ages, monthly income

features.name: Responsive Layout
features.verified: Desktop sidebar + mobile Sheet confirmed via preview

features.name: Authentication
features.verified: Login/signup pages + OAuth callback + Supabase auth

features.name: SEO Guide Content
features.verified: 5 guides seeded, SSR pages with metadata

features.name: Scenario Comparison
features.verified: 2-scenario limit, save current input, side-by-side chart + table comparison, diff display

features.name: Monte Carlo Simulation
features.verified: 1000 simulations with 15% volatility, fan chart (10-90 percentiles), success rates per FIRE type, premium gate

features.name: Portfolio Optimization
features.verified: 4 asset classes, 3 model portfolios (Conservative/Moderate/Aggressive), correlation matrix, Sharpe ratios, growth projection chart, premium gate

features.name: PWA Support
features.verified: manifest.webmanifest, SVG icon, metadata in layout (theme-color, apple-web-app)

features.name: Dark Mode
features.verified: next-themes ThemeProvider, system default, toggle in header/mobile, CSS variables in globals.css
